questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在 AWS 上實施一個新應用程式。該公司將在多個 AWS 區域內多個可用區的多個 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行該應用程式。該應用程式將透過網際網路提供。用戶將從世界各地存取該應用程式。該公司希望確保每個訪問應用程式的用戶都被傳送到距離用戶位置最近的 EC2 執行個體。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is implementing a new application on AWS. The company will run the application on multiple Amazon EC2 instances across multiple Availability Zones within multiple AWS Regions. The application will be available through the internet. Users will access the application from around the world. The company wants to ensure that each user who accesses the application is sent to the EC2 instances that are closest to the user’s location. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 實施 Amazon Route 53 地理位置路由策略。使用面向網際網路的應用程式負載平衡器在同一區域內的所有可用區之間分配流量。
A.en: Implement an Amazon Route 53 geolocation routing policy. Use an internet-facing Application Load Balancer to distribute the traffic across all Availability Zones within the same Region.

B.zh: 實施 Amazon Route 53 地理位置鄰近路由策略。使用面向網際網路的網路負載平衡器在同一區域內的所有可用區之間分配流量。
B.en: Implement an Amazon Route 53 geoproximity routing policy. Use an internet-facing Network Load Balancer to distribute the traffic across all Availability Zones within the same Region.

C.zh: 實施 Amazon Route 53 多值應答路由策略。使用面向網際網路的應用程式負載平衡器在同一區域內的所有可用區之間分配流量。
C.en: Implement an Amazon Route 53 multivalue answer routing policy. Use an internet-facing Application Load Balancer to distribute the traffic across all Availability Zones within the same Region.

D.zh: 實施 Amazon Route 53 加權路由策略。使用面向網際網路的網路負載平衡器在同一區域內的所有可用區之間分配流量。
D.en: Implement an Amazon Route 53 weighted routing policy. Use an internet-facing Network Load Balancer to distribute the traffic across all Availability Zones within the same Region.

A.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：地理位置路由策略根據使用者的地理位置來路由流量，但無法動態調整到「最近」的資源，只能根據預先定義的地理區域進行分配。錯誤原因：問題需要將使用者路由到「最近」的EC2實例，而Geolocation路由無法動態計算距離。
A.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: Geolocation routing policy routes traffic based on the user's geographical location, but it cannot dynamically adjust to the "nearest" resources and can only be allocated based on predefined geographical areas. Reason for the error: The question requires routing users to the "nearest" EC2 instance, and Geolocation routing cannot dynamically calculate distance.

B.zh: 正確。效能分析：地理位置鄰近路由策略會根據使用者和資源之間的距離來路由流量，並且可以動態調整到「最近」的資源。正確原因：此選項符合問題要求，將使用者路由到最近的EC2實例，網路負載平衡器可以有效處理跨區域流量。
B.en: Correct. Performance analysis: Geoproximity routing policy routes traffic based on the distance between users and resources, and can dynamically adjust to the "nearest" resource. Reason why it is correct: This option meets the question requirements, routing users to the nearest EC2 instance, and the Network Load Balancer can efficiently handle cross-region traffic.

C.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：多值應答路由策略傳回多個IP位址供客戶端選擇，但不會根據使用者位置動態調整流量。錯誤原因：此選項無法滿足問題所要求的「最近」資源路由功能。
C.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: Multivalue answer routing policy returns multiple IP addresses for clients to choose from, but it does not dynamically adjust traffic based on user location. Reason for the error: This option cannot meet the "nearest" resource routing function required by the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：加權路由策略根據預先定義的權重分配流量，而不是根據使用者位置動態調整流量。錯誤原因：此選項無法滿足問題所要求的「最近」資源路由功能。
D.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: Weighted routing policy allocates traffic based on predefined weights instead of dynamically adjusting traffic based on user location. Reason for the error: This option cannot meet the "nearest" resource routing function required by the question.

answer_text.zh: B. 實施 Amazon Route 53 地理位置鄰近路由策略。使用面向網際網路的網路負載平衡器在同一區域內的所有可用區之間分配流量。
answer_text.en: B. Implement an Amazon Route 53 geoproximity routing policy. Use an internet-facing Network Load Balancer to distribute the traffic across all Availability Zones within the same Region.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (63%)； A (37%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：效能分析：地理位置鄰近路由策略會根據使用者和資源之間的距離來路由流量，並且可以動態調整到「最近」的資源。正確原因：此選項符合問題要求，將使用者路由到最近的EC2實例，網路負載平衡器可以有效處理跨區域流量。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (63%); A (37%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Performance analysis: Geoproximity routing policy routes traffic based on the distance between users and resources, and can dynamically adjust to the "nearest" resource. Reason why it is correct: This option meets the question requirements, routing users to the nearest EC2 instance, and the Network Load Balancer can efficiently handle cross-region traffic.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家金融服務公司計劃在 AWS 上推出新應用程式來處理敏感的金融交易。該公司將在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上部署該應用程式。該公司將使用 Amazon RDS for MySQL 作為資料庫。該公司的安全政策要求資料在靜態和傳輸過程中必須加密。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A financial services company plans to launch a new application on AWS to handle sensitive financial transactions. The company will deploy the application on Amazon EC2 instances. The company will use Amazon RDS for MySQL as the database. The company’s security policies mandate that data must be encrypted at rest and in transit. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 使用 AWS KMS 託管金鑰為 Amazon RDS for MySQL 設定靜態加密。設定 AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) SSL/TLS 憑證以進行傳輸加密。
A.en: Configure encryption at rest for Amazon RDS for MySQL by using AWS KMS managed keys. Configure AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) SSL/TLS certificates for encryption in transit.

B.zh: 使用 AWS KMS 託管金鑰為 Amazon RDS for MySQL 設定靜態加密。配置 IPsec 隧道以進行傳輸加密。
B.en: Configure encryption at rest for Amazon RDS for MySQL by using AWS KMS managed keys. Configure IPsec tunnels for encryption in transit.

C.zh: 在 Amazon RDS for MySQL 中儲存資料之前實施第三方應用程式層級資料加密。設定 AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) SSL/TLS 憑證以進行傳輸加密。
C.en: Implement third-party application-level data encryption before storing data in Amazon RDS for MySQL. Configure AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) SSL/TLS certificates for encryption in transit.

D.zh: 使用 AWS KMS 託管金鑰為 Amazon RDS for MySQL 設定靜態加密。設定 VPN 連線以啟用專用連線來加密傳輸中的資料。
D.en: Configure encryption at rest for Amazon RDS for MySQL by using AWS KMS managed keys. Configure a VPN connection to enable private connectivity to encrypt data in transit.

A.zh: 正確。AWS KMS 是一項原生支援的服務，可輕鬆配置 RDS 資料加密，且操作開銷較低。正確：AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 提供託管 SSL/TLS 證書，自動執行證書生命週期管理，並且適合加密資料傳輸。此選項完全滿足要求並且具有最低的營運開銷。
A.en: Correct. AWS KMS is a natively supported service that makes it easy to configure RDS data encryption with low operational overhead. Correct: AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) provides managed SSL/TLS certificates, automates certificate lifecycle management, and is suitable for encrypted data transmission. This option meets the requirements perfectly and has the lowest operational overhead.

B.zh: 錯誤。AWS KMS 讓您輕鬆設定 RDS 資料加密。錯誤：IPsec常用於層加密（如VPN），不用於應用層資料傳輸加密。配置和維護 IPsec 通道需要額外的操作開銷。
B.en: Incorrect. AWS KMS makes it easy to configure RDS data encryption. Error: IPsec is often used for layer encryption (such as VPNs) and is not used for application layer data transmission encryption. Configuring and maintaining IPsec passes requires additional operational overhead.

C.zh: 錯誤。第三方應用程式的資料加密需要開發人員進行額外的工作並增加營運開銷。正確：ACM SSL/TLS 憑證對資料傳輸進行加密。此選項增加了不必要的複雜性，並且不符合最低營運開銷要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Data encryption for third-party applications requires additional work for developers and increases operational overhead. Correct: ACM SSL/TLS certificates encrypt data transmission. This option adds unnecessary complexity and does not meet the minimum operational overhead requirement.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS KMS 讓您輕鬆設定 RDS 資料加密。錯誤：VPN連接主要用於私有層連接，而不是用於應用層資料加密。設定和維護 VPN 連線需要額外的營運開銷。
D.en: Incorrect. AWS KMS makes it easy to configure RDS data encryption. Error: VPN connections are mainly used for private layer connections, not for application layer data encryption. Configuring and maintaining a VPN connection requires additional operational overhead.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 AWS KMS 託管金鑰為 Amazon RDS for MySQL 設定靜態加密。設定 AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) SSL/TLS 憑證以進行傳輸加密。
answer_text.en: A. Configure encryption at rest for Amazon RDS for MySQL by using AWS KMS managed keys. Configure AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) SSL/TLS certificates for encryption in transit.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS KMS 是一項原生支援的服務，可輕鬆配置 RDS 資料加密，且操作開銷較低。正確：AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 提供託管 SSL/TLS 證書，自動執行證書生命週期管理，並且適合加密資料傳輸。此選項完全滿足要求並且具有最低的營運開銷。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS KMS is a natively supported service that makes it easy to configure RDS data encryption with low operational overhead. Correct: AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) provides managed SSL/TLS certificates, automates certificate lifecycle management, and is suitable for encrypted data transmission. This option meets the requirements perfectly and has the lowest operational overhead.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在將其本地 Oracle 資料庫遷移到 Amazon RDS for Oracle 資料庫。該公司需要將資料保留 90 天以滿足監管要求。公司還必須能夠將資料庫恢復到最長 14 天的特定時間點。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is migrating its on-premises Oracle database to an Amazon RDS for Oracle database. The company needs to retain data for 90 days to meet regulatory requirements. The company must also be able to restore the database to a specific point in time for up to 14 days. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 建立 Amazon RDS 自動備份。將保留期限設定為 90 天。
A.en: Create Amazon RDS automated backups. Set the retention period to 90 days.

B.zh: 每天建立一個 Amazon RDS 手動快照。刪除超過 90 天的手動快照。
B.en: Create an Amazon RDS manual snapshot every day. Delete manual snapshots that are older than 90 days.

C.zh: 使用 Oracle 的 Amazon Aurora 克隆功能建立時間點復原。刪除超過 90 天的克隆。
C.en: Use the Amazon Aurora Clone feature for Oracle to create a point-in-time restore. Delete clones that are older than 90 days.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Backup for Amazon RDS 建立保留期為 90 天的備份計畫。
D.en: Create a backup plan that has a retention period of 90 days by using AWS Backup for Amazon RDS.

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon RDS 自動備份的最長保留期為 35 天，無法滿足 90 天的保留要求。自動備份雖然支援時間點恢復，但無法滿足90天的保留要求。
A.en: Incorrect. The maximum retention period for Amazon RDS automated backups is 35 days, which cannot meet the 90-day retention requirement. Although automatic backup supports point-in-time recovery, it cannot meet the 90-day retention requirement.

B.zh: 錯誤。效能：手動快照可以滿足 90 天的保留要求。錯誤：每天需要手動建立快照和管理刪除操作，增加了操作開銷，不符合「最小操作開銷」的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Performance: Manual snapshots can satisfy the 90-day retention requirement. Error: It is necessary to manually create snapshots and manage deletion operations every day, which increases operational overhead and does not meet the requirements of "minimum operational overhead".

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Aurora 克隆是 Aurora 特定的功能，不適用於 Amazon RDS for Oracle。該選項不符合題目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Amazon Aurora Clone is an Aurora-specific feature and does not apply to Amazon RDS for Oracle. This option does not meet the question requirements.

D.zh: 正確。AWS Backup 支援時間點恢復，且營運開銷極低。此選項完全滿足題目要求。
D.en: Correct. AWS Backup supports point-in-time recovery with minimal operational overhead. This option fully meets the question requirements.

answer_text.zh: D. 使用 AWS Backup for Amazon RDS 建立保留期為 90 天的備份計畫。
answer_text.en: D. Create a backup plan that has a retention period of 90 days by using AWS Backup for Amazon RDS.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Backup 支援時間點恢復，且營運開銷極低。此選項完全滿足題目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Backup supports point-in-time recovery with minimal operational overhead. This option fully meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在開發一種新應用程序，該應用程式使用關聯式資料庫來儲存使用者資料和應用程式配置。該公司預計該應用程式的用戶將穩定成長。該公司預計資料庫的使用情況是可變的，並且讀取量很大，偶爾會進行寫入。該公司希望對資料庫解決方案進行成本優化。該公司希望使用 AWS 託管資料庫解決方案來提供必要的效能。哪一種解決方案能夠最具成本效益地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is developing a new application that uses a relational database to store user data and application configurations. The company expects the application to have steady user growth. The company expects the database usage to be variable and read- heavy, with occasional writes. The company wants to cost-optimize the database solution. The company wants to use an AWS managed database solution that will provide the necessary performance. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 在 Amazon RDS 上部署資料庫。使用預先配置 IOPS SSD 儲存來確保讀寫作業的效能一致。
A.en: Deploy the database on Amazon RDS. Use Provisioned IOPS SSD storage to ensure consistent performance for read and write operations.

B.zh: 在 Amazon Aurora Serverless 上部署資料庫，以根據實際使用情況自動擴展資料庫容量以適應工作負載。
B.en: Deploy the database on Amazon Aurora Serverless to automatically scale the database capacity based on actual usage to accommodate the workload.

C.zh: 在 Amazon DynamoDB 上部署資料庫。使用按需容量模式自動擴展吞吐量以適應工作負載。
C.en: Deploy the database on Amazon DynamoDB. Use on-demand capacity mode to automatically scale throughput to accommodate the workload.

D.zh: 在 Amazon RDS 上部署資料庫。使用磁性儲存並使用唯讀副本來適應工作負載。
D.en: Deploy the database on Amazon RDS. Use magnetic storage and use read replicas to accommodate the workload.

A.zh: 錯誤。準確度分析：Provisioned IOPS SSD儲存確實可以提供一致的效能，但其成本較高，不符合問題中「成本最佳化」的要求。這個選項。
A.en: Incorrect. Accuracy analysis: Provisioned IOPS SSD storage can indeed provide consistent performance, but its cost is higher and does not meet the requirements of "cost optimization" in the question. this option.

B.zh: 正確。精確度分析：Amazon Aurora Serverless 支援資料庫容量自動擴展，可根據實際使用情況動態調整資源。適用於讀多寫少的場景，成本最佳化效果顯著。這個選項是正確的。
B.en: Correct. Accuracy analysis: Amazon Aurora Serverless supports automatic expansion of database capacity and can dynamically adjust resources according to actual usage. It is suitable for scenarios with more reads and less writes, and has significant cost optimization effects.this option is correct.

C.zh: 錯誤。DynamoDB是NoSQL資料庫，不適合儲存關聯式資料（例如使用者資料和應用程式配置），與問題不一致。這個選項。
C.en: Incorrect. DynamoDB is a NoSQL database, which is not suitable for storing relational data (such as user data and application configuration), and is inconsistent with the question. this option.

D.zh: 錯誤。精度分析：磁性儲存效能較低，不適合讀取多寫少的場景；儘管唯讀副本可以提高讀取效能，但整體解決方案並未進行成本最佳化。這個選項。
D.en: Incorrect. Accuracy analysis: The performance of magnetic storage is low and is not suitable for scenarios where there are many reads and few writes; although read replicas can improve read performance, the overall solution is not cost-optimized. this option.

answer_text.zh: B. 在 Amazon Aurora Serverless 上部署資料庫，以根據實際使用情況自動擴展資料庫容量以適應工作負載。
answer_text.en: B. Deploy the database on Amazon Aurora Serverless to automatically scale the database capacity based on actual usage to accommodate the workload.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：精確度分析：Amazon Aurora Serverless 支援資料庫容量自動擴展，可根據實際使用情況動態調整資源。適用於讀多寫少的場景，成本最佳化效果顯著。這個選項是正確的。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Accuracy analysis: Amazon Aurora Serverless supports automatic expansion of database capacity and can dynamically adjust resources according to actual usage. It is suitable for scenarios with more reads and less writes, and has significant cost optimization effects.this option is correct.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司將其應用程式託管在 VPC 內的多個 Amazon EC2 執行個體上。該公司為每個客戶創建專用的 Amazon S3 儲存桶，以將其相關資訊儲存在 Amazon S3 中。該公司希望確保在 EC2 執行個體上執行的應用程式只能安全地存取屬於公司 AWS 帳戶的 S3 儲存桶。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company hosts its application on several Amazon EC2 instances inside a VPC. The company creates a dedicated Amazon S3 bucket for each customer to store their relevant information in Amazon S3. The company wants to ensure that the application running on EC2 instances can securely access only the S3 buckets that belong to the company’s AWS account. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 為附加到 VPC 的 Amazon S3 建立網關終端節點。更新 IAM 實例設定檔策略以僅提供對應用程式所需的特定儲存桶的存取。
A.en: Create a gateway endpoint for Amazon S3 that is attached to the VPC. Update the IAM instance profile policy to provide access to only the specific buckets that the application needs.

B.zh: 在公有子網路中建立一個 NAT 網關，其中的安全群組僅允許存取 Amazon S3。更新路由表以使用 NAT 閘道。
B.en: Create a NAT gateway in a public subnet with a security group that allows access to only Amazon S3. Update the route tables to use the NAT Gateway.

C.zh: 為附加到 VP 的 Amazon S3 建立網關終端節點，使用拒絕操作和下列條件鍵更新 IAM 執行個體設定檔策略：
C.en: Create a gateway endpoint for Amazon S3 that is attached to the VPUpdate the IAM instance profile policy with a Deny action and the following condition key:

D.zh: 在公有子網路中建立 NAT 閘道。更新路由表以使用 NAT 閘道。使用拒絕操作和以下條件鍵為所有儲存桶分配儲存桶策略：
D.en: Create a NAT Gateway in a public subnet. Update route tables to use the NAT Gateway. Assign bucket policies for all buckets with a Deny action and the following condition key:

A.zh: 錯誤。分析：使用網關端點無需透過 Internet 即可安全存取 S3。更新 IAM 實例設定檔策略以限制對特定儲存桶的存取。雖然實現了目標，但需要手動更新 IAM 策略以限制對特定儲存桶的訪問，從而增加了營運開銷。此選項是正確的，但不是營運成本最低的解決方案。
A.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Use gateway endpoints to securely access S3 without going through the Internet. Update the IAM instance profile policy to restrict access to specific buckets. While the goal is achieved, it requires manually updating IAM policies to restrict access to specific buckets, adding operational overhead. This option is correct but not the least operationally expensive solution.

B.zh: 錯誤。分析：NAT閘道允許私有子網路中的實例存取Internet資源，包括S3。使用 NAT 閘道會增加成本，且安全群組無法直接限制對特定 S3 儲存桶的存取。此選項不符合要求，因為它不能確保僅存取公司帳戶的 S3 儲存桶。
B.en: Incorrect. Analysis: NAT gateway allows instances in private subnets to access Internet resources, including S3. Using a NAT gateway increases costs, and security groups cannot directly restrict access to specific S3 buckets. This option does not meet the requirements as it does not ensure access to only the company account's S3 bucket.

C.zh: 正確。分析：網關端點提供安全的 S3 存取。透過 IAM 政策中的 Deny 操作和條件鍵，您可以確保實例只能存取公司帳戶的 S3 儲存桶。此方法自動化程度高，運行開銷最小。該選項是正確答案。
C.en: Correct. Analysis: The gateway endpoint provides secure S3 access. Through the Deny action and condition key in the IAM policy, you can ensure that the instance can only access the S3 bucket of the company account. This method has high automation and minimal operating overhead. This option is the correct answer.

D.zh: 錯誤。分析：NAT閘道允許私有子網路中的實例存取Internet資源，包括S3。可以透過儲存桶策略限制存取。使用 NAT 網關會增加成本，並且需要為每個儲存桶進行單獨的策略配置，從而導致較高的營運開銷。由於操作開銷較高，此選項不符合要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Analysis: NAT gateway allows instances in private subnets to access Internet resources, including S3. Access can be restricted through bucket policies. Using a NAT gateway increases costs and requires a separate policy configuration for each bucket, resulting in high operational overhead. This option does not meet the requirements because of the high operational overhead.

answer_text.zh: C. 為附加到 VP 的 Amazon S3 建立網關終端節點，使用拒絕操作和下列條件鍵更新 IAM 執行個體設定檔策略：
answer_text.en: C. Create a gateway endpoint for Amazon S3 that is attached to the VPUpdate the IAM instance profile policy with a Deny action and the following condition key:

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (67%)； A (33%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：分析：網關端點提供安全的 S3 存取。透過 IAM 政策中的 Deny 操作和條件鍵，您可以確保實例只能存取公司帳戶的 S3 儲存桶。此方法自動化程度高，運行開銷最小。該選項是正確答案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (67%); A (33%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: The gateway endpoint provides secure S3 access. Through the Deny action and condition key in the IAM policy, you can ensure that the instance can only access the S3 bucket of the company account. This method has high automation and minimal operating overhead. This option is the correct answer.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在 AWS 上建立基於雲端的應用程序，用於處理敏感的客戶資料。該應用程式使用 Amazon RDS 作為資料庫，使用 Amazon S3 作為物件存儲，並使用呼叫 AWS Lambda 進行無伺服器處理的 S3 事件通知。該公司使用 AWS IAM Identity Center 來管理使用者憑證。開發、測試和營運團隊需要安全存取 Amazon RDS 和 Amazon S3，同時確保敏感客戶資料的機密性。解決方案必須符合最小特權原則。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is building a cloud-based application on AWS that will handle sensitive customer data. The application uses Amazon RDS for the database, Amazon S3 for object storage, and S3 Event Notifications that invoke AWS Lambda for serverless processing. The company uses AWS IAM Identity Center to manage user credentials. The development, testing, and operations teams need secure access to Amazon RDS and Amazon S3 while ensuring the confidentiality of sensitive customer data. The solution must comply with the principle of least privilege. Which solution meets these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 使用具有最低權限的 IAM 角色來授予所有團隊存取權限。使用自訂 IAM 策略將 IAM 角色指派給每個團隊，該原則會根據團隊職責定義 Amazon RDS 和 S3 物件存取的特定權限。
A.en: Use IAM roles with least privilege to grant all the teams access. Assign IAM roles to each team with customized IAM policies defining specific permission for Amazon RDS and S3 object access based on team responsibilities.

B.zh: 使用身分中心目錄啟用 IAM 身分中心。建立和配置權限集，並對 Amazon RDS 和 Amazon S3 進行精細存取。將所有團隊指派到具有權限集特定存取權限的群組。
B.en: Enable IAM Identity Center with an Identity Center directory. Create and configure permission sets with granular access to Amazon RDS and Amazon S3. Assign all the teams to groups that have specific access with the permission sets.

C.zh: 為所有團隊中的每個成員建立具有基於角色的權限的單獨 IAM 使用者。根據使用者需求，為每個使用者指派具有 RDS 和 S3 存取預定義策略的 IAM 角色。實施 IAM 存取分析器以進行定期憑證評估。
C.en: Create individual IAM users for each member in all the teams with role-based permissions. Assign the IAM roles with predefined policies for RDS and S3 access to each user based on user needs. Implement IAM Access Analyzer for periodic credential evaluation.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Organizations 為每個團隊建立單獨的帳戶。以最小權限實施跨帳戶 IAM 角色。根據團隊角色和職責授予 RDS 和 S3 存取的特定權限。
D.en: Use AWS Organizations to create separate accounts for each team. Implement cross-account IAM roles with least privilege. Grant specific permission for RDS and S3 access based on team roles and responsibilities.

A.zh: 錯誤。單獨的自訂 IAM 角色可以強制執行最低權限，但為每個團隊手動維護角色和策略會比集中式 Identity Center 權限集產生更多開銷。
A.en: Incorrect. Separate customized IAM roles can enforce least privilege, but manually maintaining roles and policies for every team creates more overhead than centralized Identity Center permission sets.

B.zh: 正確。啟用 IAM Identity Center 並使用權限集： Veracity：IAM Identity Center 支援集中管理使用者身分和權限。權限集可以實現細粒度的控制，並遵守最小權限原則。優點：透過群組和權限集的管理簡化營運開銷，同時確保安全性和合規性。它滿足所有要求並且具有最低的營運開銷，因此它是最佳解決方案。
B.en: Correct. Enable IAM Identity Center and use permission sets: Veracity: IAM Identity Center supports centralized management of user identities and permissions. Permission sets can implement fine-grained control and comply with the principle of least privilege. Benefits: Simplifies operational overhead through the management of groups and permission sets while ensuring security and compliance. It meets all the requirements and has the lowest operating overhead, so it is the best solution.

C.zh: 錯誤。可以透過IAM使用者和角色實現權限管理。需要建立一個IAM使用者並為每個使用者分配權限。管理複雜度高，不符合集中管理的最佳實務。操作開銷較高，不是最佳解決方案。
C.en: Incorrect. Permission management can be implemented through IAM users and roles. It is necessary to create an IAM user and assign permissions to each user. The management complexity is high and does not comply with the best practices of centralized management. The operation overhead is high and not the best solution.

D.zh: 錯誤。單獨的 AWS 帳戶和跨帳戶角色可以強制隔離，但它們為存取相同應用程式資源的團隊增加了不必要的帳戶和信任策略管理。
D.en: Incorrect. Separate AWS accounts and cross-account roles can enforce isolation, but they add unnecessary account and trust-policy administration for teams accessing the same application resources.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用身分中心目錄啟用 IAM 身分中心。建立和配置權限集，並對 Amazon RDS 和 Amazon S3 進行精細存取。將所有團隊指派到具有權限集特定存取權限的群組。
answer_text.en: B. Enable IAM Identity Center with an Identity Center directory. Create and configure permission sets with granular access to Amazon RDS and Amazon S3. Assign all the teams to groups that have specific access with the permission sets.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：啟用 IAM Identity Center 並使用權限集： Veracity：IAM Identity Center 支援集中管理使用者身分和權限。權限集可以實現細粒度的控制，並遵守最小權限原則。優點：透過群組和權限集的管理簡化營運開銷，同時確保安全性和合規性。它滿足所有要求並且具有最低的營運開銷，因此它是最佳解決方案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Enable IAM Identity Center and use permission sets: Veracity: IAM Identity Center supports centralized management of user identities and permissions. Permission sets can implement fine-grained control and comply with the principle of least privilege. Benefits: Simplifies operational overhead through the management of groups and permission sets while ensuring security and compliance. It meets all the requirements and has the lowest operating overhead, so it is the best solution.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司有一個包含敏感資料檔案的 Amazon S3 儲存桶。該公司有一個在本地資料中心的虛擬機器上運行的應用程式。該公司目前使用 AWS IAM Identity Center。應用程式需要暫時存取 S3 儲存桶中的檔案。該公司希望授予應用程式對 S3 儲存桶中的檔案的安全存取權。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has an Amazon S3 bucket that contains sensitive data files. The company has an application that runs on virtual machines in an on-premises data center. The company currently uses AWS IAM Identity Center. The application requires temporary access to files in the S3 bucket. The company wants to grant the application secure access to the files in the S3 bucket. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 建立一個 S3 儲存桶策略，允許從公司本地資料中心的公用 IP 位址範圍存取該儲存桶。
A.en: Create an S3 bucket policy that permits access to the bucket from the public IP address range of the company’s on-premises data center.

B.zh: 使用 IAM Roles Anywhere 取得 IAM Identity Center 中授予 S3 儲存桶存取權限的安全性憑證。使用 AWS CLI 設定虛擬機器以代入該角色。
B.en: Use IAM Roles Anywhere to obtain security credentials in IAM Identity Center that grant access to the S3 bucket. Configure the virtual machines to assume the role by using the AWS CLI.

C.zh: 在虛擬機器上安裝 AWS CLI。使用有權存取儲存桶的 IAM 使用者的存取金鑰來配置 AWS CLI。
C.en: Install the AWS CLI on the virtual machine. Configure the AWS CLI with access keys from an IAM user that has access to the bucket.

D.zh: 建立授予儲存桶存取權限的 IAM 使用者和策略。將 IAM 使用者的存取金鑰和金鑰儲存在 AWS Secrets Manager 中。配置應用程式以在啟動時檢索存取密鑰和秘密密鑰。
D.en: Create an IAM user and policy that grants access to the bucket. Store the access key and secret key for the IAM user in AWS Secrets Manager. Configure the application to retrieve the access key and secret key at startup.

A.zh: 錯誤。雖然可以透過IP位址範圍限制存取來實現存取控制，但這種方法不夠安全，尤其是對於敏感資料檔案。 IP 位址可能會被欺騙，並且無法提供臨時憑證。
A.en: Incorrect. Although access control can be achieved by restricting access through IP address ranges, this method is not secure enough, especially for sensitive data files. IP addresses can be spoofed and temporary credentials cannot be provided.

B.zh: 正確。IAM Roles Anywhere 允許本機應用程式安全地取得臨時憑證並存取 AWS 資源。透過 AWS CLI 配置虛擬機器以承擔角色是一種安全且最佳實踐的解決方案。
B.en: Correct. IAM Roles Anywhere allows local applications to securely obtain temporary credentials and access AWS resources. Configuring a virtual machine to assume a role via the AWS CLI is a secure and best-practice solution.

C.zh: 錯誤。直接使用 IAM 使用者的存取金鑰和秘密金鑰會帶來安全風險，因為這些金鑰是長期憑證，很容易洩漏或濫用。
C.en: Incorrect. Directly using an IAM user's access keys and secret keys poses a security risk because these keys are long-term credentials that can be easily leaked or misused.

D.zh: 錯誤。雖然使用 AWS Secrets Manager 儲存金鑰可以提高安全性，但它仍然依賴 IAM 使用者的長期憑證，並且不符合臨時存取的最佳實務。
D.en: Incorrect. While using AWS Secrets Manager to store secrets improves security, it still relies on the IAM user's long-term credentials and does not comply with best practices for temporary access.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 IAM Roles Anywhere 取得 IAM Identity Center 中授予 S3 儲存桶存取權限的安全性憑證。使用 AWS CLI 設定虛擬機器以代入該角色。
answer_text.en: B. Use IAM Roles Anywhere to obtain security credentials in IAM Identity Center that grant access to the S3 bucket. Configure the virtual machines to assume the role by using the AWS CLI.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (89%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：IAM Roles Anywhere 允許本機應用程式安全地取得臨時憑證並存取 AWS 資源。透過 AWS CLI 配置虛擬機器以承擔角色是一種安全且最佳實踐的解決方案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (89%). Popular discussion and key point summary: IAM Roles Anywhere allows local applications to securely obtain temporary credentials and access AWS resources. Configuring a virtual machine to assume a role via the AWS CLI is a secure and best-practice solution.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在其本地資料中心託管其核心網路服務，包括目錄服務和 DNS。資料中心使用 AWS Direct Connect (DX) 連接到 AWS 雲端。計劃增加更多 AWS 帳戶，這些帳戶將需要快速、經濟高效且一致地存取這些網路服務。解決方案架構師應該實施什麼來以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company hosts its core network services, including directory services and DNS, in its on-premises data center. The data center is connected to the AWS Cloud using AWS Direct Connect (DX). Additional AWS accounts are planned that will require quick, cost- effective, and consistent access to these network services. What should a solutions architect implement to meet these requirements with the LEAST amount of operational overhead?

A.zh: 在每個新帳戶中建立 DX 連線。將網路流量路由到本地伺服器。
A.en: Create a DX connection in each new account. Route the network traffic to the on-premises servers.

B.zh: 在 DX VPC 中為所有所需服務配置 VPC 終端節點。將網路流量路由到本地伺服器。
B.en: Configure VPC endpoints in the DX VPC for all required services. Route the network traffic to the on-premises servers.

C.zh: 在每個新帳戶和 DX VP 之間建立 VPN 連接，將網路流量路由到本機伺服器。
C.en: Create a VPN connection between each new account and the DX VPRoute the network traffic to the on-premises servers.

D.zh: 在帳戶之間設定 AWS Transit Gateway。將 DX 指派給中轉網關，並將網路流量路由到本機伺服器。
D.en: Configure AWS Transit Gateway between the accounts. Assign DX to the transit gateway and route network traffic to the on- premises servers.

A.zh: 錯誤。建立多個 DX 連線會產生很高的成本，因為每個 DX 連線都需要額外費用。錯誤：操作開銷較高，因為需要為每個帳戶單獨配置 DX 連線。 「最少的營運開銷」不符合問題要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Creating multiple DX connections incurs high costs, as each DX connection requires additional charges. Error: Operational overhead is higher because DX connections need to be configured individually for each account. "LEAST amount of operational overhead" that does not meet the question requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。VPC端點主要用於存取AWS服務（例如S3，DynamoDB），而不是連接到本機資料中心。錯誤：無法直接透過VPC端點實現與本機伺服器的跨帳戶網路連線。
B.en: Incorrect. VPC Endpoints are mainly used to access AWS services (such as S3, DynamoDB), rather than connecting to local data centers. Error: Cross-account network connection to the local server cannot be achieved directly through VPC Endpoints.

C.zh: 錯誤。為每個帳戶建立 VPN 連線會增加營運開銷和複雜性。錯誤：VPN連線的效能通常不如DX連接，不符合問題中「快速、性價比、穩定」的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Creating VPN connections for each account adds operational overhead and complexity. Wrong: The performance of VPN connections is usually not as good as that of DX connections, and does not meet the requirements of the question to be "fast, cost-effective, and stable.".

D.zh: 正確。AWS Transit Gateway 可有效率地連接多個 VPC 和帳戶，從而簡化網路架構。正確：將 DX 連線指派給 Transit Gateway 可實現與本機資料中心的快速、穩定的網路連線。正確：滿足問題要求的「最少的營運開銷」。
D.en: Correct. AWS Transit Gateway can efficiently connect multiple VPCs and accounts, simplifying the network architecture. Correct: Assigning a DX connection to a Transit Gateway enables fast, stable network connectivity to the local data center. Correct: "LEAST amount of operational overhead" that meets the question requirements.

answer_text.zh: D. 在帳戶之間設定 AWS Transit Gateway。將 DX 指派給中轉網關，並將網路流量路由到本機伺服器。
answer_text.en: D. Configure AWS Transit Gateway between the accounts. Assign DX to the transit gateway and route network traffic to the on- premises servers.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Transit Gateway 可有效率地連接多個 VPC 和帳戶，從而簡化網路架構。正確：將 DX 連線指派給 Transit Gateway 可實現與本機資料中心的快速、穩定的網路連線。正確：滿足問題要求的「最少的營運開銷」。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Transit Gateway can efficiently connect multiple VPCs and accounts, simplifying the network architecture. Correct: Assigning a DX connection to a Transit Gateway enables fast, stable network connectivity to the local data center. Correct: "LEAST amount of operational overhead" that meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在跨多個可用區的一個 AWS 區域託管其主要公共 Web 應用程式。該應用程式使用 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 群組和應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB)。 Web 開發團隊需要成本優化的運算解決方案，以提高公司向全球數百萬客戶提供動態內容的能力。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company hosts its main public web application in one AWS Region across multiple Availability Zones. The application uses an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group and an Application Load Balancer (ALB). A web development team needs a cost-optimized compute solution to improve the company’s ability to serve dynamic content globally to millions of customers. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 建立 Amazon CloudFront 分配。將現有 ALB 配置為來源。
A.en: Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution. Configure the existing ALB as the origin.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon Route 53 根據每個客戶的地理位置向 ALB 和 EC2 執行個體提供流量。
B.en: Use Amazon Route 53 to serve traffic to the ALB and EC2 instances based on the geographic location of each customer.

C.zh: 建立啟用公共讀取存取的 Amazon S3 儲存桶。將 Web 應用程式移轉到 S3 儲存桶。配置用於網站託管的 S3 儲存桶。
C.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket with public read access enabled. Migrate the web application to the S3 bucket. Configure the S3 bucket for website hosting.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Direct Connect 將內容從 Web 應用程式直接提供到每個客戶的位置。
D.en: Use AWS Direct Connect to directly serve content from the web application to the location of each customer.

A.zh: 正確。Amazon CloudFront 是一個全球內容交付網路 (CDN)，可快取和交付動態內容，從而減少延遲並優化成本。將 Toyo 的 ALB 配置為 CloudFront 來源是一種常見的架構模式，可有效地將動態內容分發給世界各地的使用者。
A.en: Correct. Amazon CloudFront is a global content delivery network (CDN) that caches and delivers dynamic content, reducing latency and optimizing costs. Configuring Toyo's ALB as a CloudFront source is a common architectural pattern that can effectively distribute dynamic content to users around the world.

B.zh: 錯誤。雖然 Amazon Route 53 支援基於地理位置的流量路由，但它沒有優化動態內容的分發，也沒有提供快取功能。此選項沒有提及如何降低成本或提高效能。
B.en: Incorrect. Although Amazon Route 53 supports traffic routing based on geographic location, it does not optimize the distribution of dynamic content and does not provide caching capabilities. this option make no mention of how to reduce costs or improve performance.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon S3適合靜態網站託管，問題中明確提到需要優化動態內容的分發。動態內容不是直接透過S3託管的，將整個應用程式遷移到S3並不能滿足問題的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Amazon S3 is suitable for static website hosting, and the question clearly mentions the need to optimize the distribution of dynamic content. Dynamic content is not hosted directly through S3, and migrating the entire application to S3 does not meet the requirements of the problem.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS Direct Connect 是一種網路連接服務，用於建立專線連接，適用於企業內部網路與 AWS 之間的通訊。 Direct Connect 不適合動態內容的全球分發，且無法最佳化成本。
D.en: Incorrect. AWS Direct Connect is a network connection service that is used to establish dedicated line connections and is suitable for communication between an enterprise's internal network and AWS. Direct Connect is not suitable for global distribution of dynamic content and does not optimize costs.

answer_text.zh: A. 建立 Amazon CloudFront 分配。將現有 ALB 配置為來源。
answer_text.en: A. Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution. Configure the existing ALB as the origin.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon CloudFront 是一個全球內容交付網路 (CDN)，可快取和交付動態內容，從而減少延遲並優化成本。將 Toyo 的 ALB 配置為 CloudFront 來源是一種常見的架構模式，可有效地將動態內容分發給世界各地的使用者。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon CloudFront is a global content delivery network (CDN) that caches and delivers dynamic content, reducing latency and optimizing costs. Configuring Toyo's ALB as a CloudFront source is a common architectural pattern that can effectively distribute dynamic content to users around the world.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司將使用者資料儲存在 AWS 中。數據在工作時間高峰時段持續使用。存取模式各不相同，有些資料一次幾個月都不使用。解決方案架構師必須選擇一種經濟高效的解決方案，在保持高可用性的同時保持最高水準的耐用性。哪種儲存解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company stores user data in AWS. The data is used continuously with peak usage during business hours. Access patterns vary, with some data not being used for months at a time. A solutions architect must choose a cost-effective solution that maintains the highest level of durability while maintaining high availability. Which storage solution meets these requirements?

A.zh: 亞馬遜 S3 標準
A.en: Amazon S3 Standard

B.zh: Amazon S3 智慧分層
B.en: Amazon S3 Intelligent-Tiering

C.zh: Amazon S3 Glacier 深度存檔
C.en: Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive

D.zh: Amazon S3 一區-不頻繁存取 (S3 一區-IA)
D.en: Amazon S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA)

A.zh: 錯誤。提供高可用性和高持久性，適合頻繁存取的資料。但其成本較高，不適合存取模式變化較大的場景。由於這種方法，此選項是錯誤的。
A.en: Incorrect. provides high availability and high durability, suitable for frequently accessed data. However, its cost is high and it is not suitable for scenarios with large changes in access patterns. this option is wrong because of this approach.

B.zh: 正確。根據存取模式自動將資料移至最適合的儲存層。它支援高可用性和高持久性，同時優化成本，非常適合存取模式變化的場景。由於採用了這種方法，因此該選項是正確的。
B.en: Correct. automatically moves data to the most appropriate storage tier based on access patterns. It supports high availability and high durability while optimizing costs, and is very suitable for scenarios where access patterns change. Because of the this approach, this option are correct.

C.zh: 錯誤。是成本最低的存儲選項，但它主要用於資料的長期存儲，並且檢索時間較長。不適合需要高可用性和頻繁存取的資料。由於這種做法。
C.en: Incorrect. is the lowest-cost storage option, but it is mainly used for long-term storage of data, and the retrieval time is long. It is not suitable for data that requires high availability and frequent access. Because of this approach.

D.zh: 錯誤。Amazon S3 One Zone-IA 較便宜，但它只儲存在單一可用區中，並且提供無條帶的高可用性，這不符合問題的要求。由於這種做法。
D.en: Incorrect. Amazon S3 One Zone-IA is cheaper, but it only stores in a single availability zone and provides high availability without stripes, which does not meet the requirements of the question. Because of this approach.

answer_text.zh: B. Amazon S3 智慧分層

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：根據存取模式自動將資料移至最適合的儲存層。它支援高可用性和高持久性，同時優化成本，非常適合存取模式變化的場景。由於採用了這種方法，因此該選項是正確的。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: automatically moves data to the most appropriate storage tier based on access patterns. It supports high availability and high durability while optimizing costs, and is very suitable for scenarios where access patterns change. Because of the this approach, this option are correct.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在測試在 Amazon EC2 Linux 執行個體上執行的應用程式。單一 500 GB Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 通用 SSO (gp2) 磁碟區附加到 EC2 執行個體。該公司將在 Auto Scaling 組中的多個 EC2 執行個體上部署該應用程式。所有實例都需要存取儲存在 EBS 磁碟區中的資料。該公司需要一個高度可用且具有彈性的解決方案，並且不會對應用程式程式碼進行重大更改。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is testing an application that runs on an Amazon EC2 Linux instance. A single 500 GB Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) General Purpose SSO (gp2) volume is attached to the EC2 instance. The company will deploy the application on multiple EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group. All instances require access to the data that is stored in the EBS volume. The company needs a highly available and resilient solution that does not introduce significant changes to the application's code. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 設定使用 NFS 伺服器軟體的 EC2 執行個體。將單一 500 GB gp2 EBS 磁碟區附加到執行個體。
A.en: Provision an EC2 instance that uses NFS server software. Attach a single 500 GB gp2 EBS volume to the instance.

B.zh: 預置 Amazon FSx for Windows File Server 檔案系統。將檔案系統配置為單一可用區內的 SMB 檔案儲存。
B.en: Provision an Amazon FSx for Windows File Server file system. Configure the file system as an SMB file store within a single Availability Zone.

C.zh: 預置具有兩個 250 GB 預先配置 IOPS SSD EBS 磁碟區的 EC2 執行個體。
C.en: Provision an EC2 instance with two 250 GB Provisioned IOPS SSD EBS volumes.

D.zh: 預置 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 檔案系統。設定檔系統以使用通用效能模式。
D.en: Provision an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. Configure the file system to use General Purpose performance mode.

A.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：雖然NFS可以提供​​共享存儲，但它依賴單一EC2實例作為伺服器。如果執行個體發生故障，儲存將不可用，因此無法滿足高可用性和彈性要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: Although NFS can provide shared storage, it relies on a single EC2 instance as the server. If the instance fails, the storage will be unavailable and therefore will not meet high availability and resiliency requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：Amazon FSx for Windows File Server 是專為 Windows 應用程式設計的檔案儲存解決方案，使用 SMB 協定。但問題沒有提到該應用程式需要 Windows 檔案系統支援。此外，單可用區配置無法滿足高可用性要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: Amazon FSx for Windows File Server is a file storage solution designed for Windows applications, using the SMB protocol. But the question does not mention that the application requires Windows file system support. Additionally, single-AZ configurations do not meet high availability requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：此選項僅提供高效能存儲，但不解決共用儲存的需求。多個 EC2 執行個體無法直接存取這些 EBS 磁碟區。
C.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: This option only provides high-performance storage but does not address the need for shared storage. Multiple EC2 instances cannot directly access these EBS volumes.

D.zh: 正確。效能分析：Amazon EFS 是一種完全託管的共享檔案儲存服務，支援多個 EC2 執行個體同時存取。通用性能模型提供了高可用性和彈性，滿足問題的要求。正確的。
D.en: Correct. Performance analysis: Amazon EFS is a fully managed shared file storage service that supports simultaneous access by multiple EC2 instances. The General Purpose performance model provides high availability and elasticity and meets the requirements of the question. Correct.

answer_text.zh: D. 預置 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 檔案系統。設定檔系統以使用通用效能模式。
answer_text.en: D. Provision an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. Configure the file system to use General Purpose performance mode.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：效能分析：Amazon EFS 是一種完全託管的共享檔案儲存服務，支援多個 EC2 執行個體同時存取。通用性能模型提供了高可用性和彈性，滿足問題的要求。正確的。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Performance analysis: Amazon EFS is a fully managed shared file storage service that supports simultaneous access by multiple EC2 instances. The General Purpose performance model provides high availability and elasticity and meets the requirements of the question. Correct.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司最近為其客戶推出了一款新應用程式。該應用程式在跨兩個可用區的多個 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行。最終用戶使用 TCP 與應用程式進行通訊。應用程式必須具有高可用性，並且必須隨著使用者數量的增加而自動擴展。哪一種步驟組合能夠最經濟有效地滿足這些要求？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: A company recently launched a new application for its customers. The application runs on multiple Amazon EC2 instances across two Availability Zones. End users use TCP to communicate with the application. The application must be highly available and must automatically scale as the number of users increases. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 在 EC2 執行個體前面新增網路負載平衡器。
A.en: Add a Network Load Balancer in front of the EC2 instances.

B.zh: 為 EC2 執行個體配置 Auto Scaling 群組。
B.en: Configure an Auto Scaling group for the EC2 instances.

C.zh: 在 EC2 執行個體前面新增一個應用程式負載平衡器。
C.en: Add an Application Load Balancer in front of the EC2 instances.

D.zh: 為應用程式手動新增更多 EC2 執行個體。
D.en: Manually add more EC2 instances for the application.

E.zh: 在 EC2 執行個體前面新增網關負載平衡器。
E.en: Add a Gateway Load Balancer in front of the EC2 instances.

A.zh: 正確。網路負載平衡器 (NLB) 是一種高效能負載平衡器，旨在處理 TCP 流量。問題明確提到使用者使用 TCP 與應用程式通信，因此 NLB 是一個合適的選擇。成本效益：NLB 在處理 TCP 流量時具有非常高的效能和成本效益。
A.en: Correct. Network Load Balancer (NLB) is a high-performance load balancer designed to handle TCP traffic. The question clearly mentions that users use TCP to communicate with applications, so NLB is a suitable choice. Cost Effectiveness: NLB is very performance and cost effective when handling TCP traffic.

B.zh: 正確。Auto Scaling群組可根據使用者需求動態調整EC2執行個體數量，實現自動伸縮和高可用性。成本效益：透過自動擴容，避免資源過度分配，節省成本。
B.en: Correct. Auto Scaling groups can dynamically adjust the number of EC2 instances based on user needs, enabling automatic scaling and high availability. Cost-effectiveness: Through automatic expansion, over-allocation of resources is avoided and costs are saved.

C.zh: 錯誤。應用程式負載平衡器（ALB）主要用於處理HTTP和HTTPS流量，且問題中明確提到使用者使用TCP通信，因此ALB不適合這種場景。
C.en: Incorrect. Application Load Balancer (ALB) is mainly used to process HTTP and HTTPS traffic, and the question clearly mentions that users use TCP communication, so ALB is not suitable for this scenario.

D.zh: 錯誤。手動新增EC2實例不剝離不自動擴展，管理成本較高，不符合問題的「自動擴展」和「高可用」要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Manually adding EC2 instances does not automatically expand without stripping, and the management cost is high, which does not meet the "automatic expansion" and "high availability" requirements of the question.

E.zh: 錯誤。閘道負載平衡器主要用於第三方虛擬設備（例如防火牆和入侵偵測系統）的網路流量。它不適合直接處理 TCP 流量的應用程式負載平衡。
E.en: Incorrect. Gateway Load Balancer is mainly used for third-party virtual devices (such as firewalls and intrusion detection systems) for network traffic. It is not suitable for application load balancing that directly handles TCP traffic.

answer_text.zh: A. 在 EC2 執行個體前面新增網路負載平衡器。；B. 為 EC2 執行個體配置 Auto Scaling 群組。
answer_text.en: A. Add a Network Load Balancer in front of the EC2 instances.; B. Configure an Auto Scaling group for the EC2 instances.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：AB (79%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：網路負載平衡器 (NLB) 是一種高效能負載平衡器，旨在處理 TCP 流量。問題明確提到使用者使用 TCP 與應用程式通信，因此 NLB 是一個合適的選擇。成本效益：NLB 在處理 TCP 流量時具有非常高的效能和成本效益。；Auto Scaling群組可根據使用者需求動態調整EC2執行個體數量，實現自動伸縮和高可用性。成本效益：透過自動擴容，避免資源過度分配，節省成本。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AB (79%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Network Load Balancer (NLB) is a high-performance load balancer designed to handle TCP traffic. The question clearly mentions that users use TCP to communicate with applications, so NLB is a suitable choice. Cost Effectiveness: NLB is very performance and cost effective when handling TCP traffic.; Auto Scaling groups can dynamically adjust the number of EC2 instances based on user needs, enabling automatic scaling and high availability. Cost-effectiveness: Through automatic expansion, over-allocation of resources is avoided and costs are saved.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在設計使用 AWS 雲端的新行動應用程式的架構。該公司使用 AWS Organizations 中的組織單位 (OU) 來管理其帳戶。該公司希望透過使用敏感和不敏感的值來標記 Amazon EC2 執行個體的資料敏感度。 IAM 身分不得刪除標籤或建立沒有標籤的實例。哪一種步驟組合可以滿足這些要求？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: A company is designing the architecture for a new mobile app that uses the AWS Cloud. The company uses organizational units (OUs) in AWS Organizations to manage its accounts. The company wants to tag Amazon EC2 instances with data sensitivity by using values of sensitive and nonsensitive. IAM identities must not be able to delete a tag or create instances without a tag. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 在組織中，建立一個新的標籤策略，指定資料敏感度標籤鍵和所需的值。強制執行 EC2 執行個體的標籤值。將標籤策略附加到適當的 OU。
A.en: In Organizations, create a new tag policy that specifies the data sensitivity tag key and the required values. Enforce the tag values for the EC2 instances. Attach the tag policy to the appropriate OU.

B.zh: 在組織中，建立一個新的服務控制策略 (SCP)，指定資料敏感度標籤鍵和所需的標籤值。強制執行 EC2 執行個體的標籤值。將 SCP 連接到適當的 OU。
B.en: In Organizations, create a new service control policy (SCP) that specifies the data sensitivity tag key and the required tag values. Enforce the tag values for the EC2 instances. Attach the SCP to the appropriate OU.

C.zh: 建立標籤策略以在未指定標籤鍵時拒絕執行實例。建立另一個標籤策略以防止身分刪除標籤。將標籤策略附加到適當的 OU。
C.en: Create a tag policy to deny running instances when a tag key is not specified. Create another tag policy that prevents identities from deleting tags. Attach the tag policies to the appropriate OU.

D.zh: 建立服務控制策略 (SCP)，以在未指定標籤鍵時拒絕建立實例。建立另一個 SCP 以防止身分刪除標籤。將 SCP 連接到適當的 OU。
D.en: Create a service control policy (SCP) to deny creating instances when a tag key is not specified. Create another SCP that prevents identities from deleting tags. Attach the SCPs to the appropriate OU.

E.zh: 建立 AWS Config 規則以檢查 EC2 執行個體是否使用資料敏感度標籤和指定值。配置 AWS Lambda 函數以在發現不合規資源時刪除資源。
E.en: Create an AWS Config rule to check if EC2 instances use the data sensitivity tag and the specified values. Configure an AWS Lambda function to delete the resource if a noncompliant resource is found.

A.zh: 正確。標籤策略可以強制資源使用特定的標籤鍵和值，並且可以附加到 OU 以套用至相關帳戶。但標籤策略不能直接阻止建立無標籤實例或阻止刪除標籤，因此需要與其他策略（如 SCP）結合使用。
A.en: Correct. Tag Policy can force resources to use specific tag keys and values, and can be attached to an OU to apply to related accounts. However, label policies cannot directly prevent the creation of instances without labels or prevent the deletion of labels, so they need to be combined with other policies (such as SCP).

B.zh: 錯誤。SCP 可以限制建立沒有標籤的實例，但不能直接強制資源使用特定的標籤鍵和值。 SCP的作用是限制權限，而不是管理標籤的具體值。
B.en: Incorrect. SCP can restrict the creation of instances without tags, but cannot directly force resources to use specific tag keys and values. The role of SCP is to restrict permissions, not to manage the specific values ​​of tags.

C.zh: 錯誤。標籤策略無法直接實作「拒絕沒有指定標籤鍵的運行實例」或「防止標籤被刪除」的功能。這些功能都需要透過SCP來實現。
C.en: Incorrect. Tag Policy cannot directly implement the functions of "deny running instances without specified tag keys" or "prevent tags from being deleted". These functions need to be implemented through SCP.

D.zh: 正確。SCP 可以限制建立沒有標籤的實例，並且可以防止 IAM 身分刪除標籤。透過將 SCP 附加到 OU，可以在組織範圍內強制執行這些限制。
D.en: Correct. SCP can restrict the creation of instances without tags and can prevent IAM identities from removing tags. By attaching an SCP to an OU, these restrictions can be enforced organization-wide.

E.zh: 錯誤。AWS Config 規則可以檢查資源是否符合標籤要求，但無法阻止建立沒有標籤的執行個體或封鎖刪除標籤。使用Lambda函數刪除資源是一種後處理方法，而問題需要採取預防措施。
E.en: Incorrect. AWS Config rules can check whether a resource meets tag requirements, but it cannot prevent the creation of instances without tags or prevent tags from being removed. Using the Lambda function to delete resources is a post-processing method, while the question requires preventive measures.

answer_text.zh: A. 在組織中，建立一個新的標籤策略，指定資料敏感度標籤鍵和所需的值。強制執行 EC2 執行個體的標籤值。將標籤策略附加到適當的 OU。；D. 建立服務控制策略 (SCP)，以在未指定標籤鍵時拒絕建立實例。建立另一個 SCP 以防止身分刪除標籤。將 SCP 連接到適當的 OU。
answer_text.en: A. In Organizations, create a new tag policy that specifies the data sensitivity tag key and the required values. Enforce the tag values for the EC2 instances. Attach the tag policy to the appropriate OU.; D. Create a service control policy (SCP) to deny creating instances when a tag key is not specified. Create another SCP that prevents identities from deleting tags. Attach the SCPs to the appropriate OU.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：AD (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：標籤策略可以強制資源使用特定的標籤鍵和值，並且可以附加到 OU 以套用至相關帳戶。但標籤策略不能直接阻止建立無標籤實例或阻止刪除標籤，因此需要與其他策略（如 SCP）結合使用。；SCP 可以限制建立沒有標籤的實例，並且可以防止 IAM 身分刪除標籤。透過將 SCP 附加到 OU，可以在組織範圍內強制執行這些限制。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AD (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Tag Policy can force resources to use specific tag keys and values, and can be attached to an OU to apply to related accounts. However, label policies cannot directly prevent the creation of instances without labels or prevent the deletion of labels, so they need to be combined with other policies (such as SCP).; SCP can restrict the creation of instances without tags and can prevent IAM identities from removing tags. By attaching an SCP to an OU, these restrictions can be enforced organization-wide.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 AWS 上執行資料庫工作負載，AWS 是該公司客戶入口網站的後端。該公司在 Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL 上運行多可用區資料庫叢集。公司需要實施 30 天的備份保留政策。該公司目前擁有自動 RDS 備份和手動 RDS 備份。該公司希望維護這兩種類型的 30 天以內現有的 RDS 備份。哪一種解決方案能夠最具成本效益地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs database workloads on AWS that are the backend for the company's customer portals. The company runs a Multi-AZ database cluster on Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL. The company needs to implement a 30-day backup retention policy. The company currently has both automated RDS backups and manual RDS backups. The company wants to maintain both types of existing RDS backups that are less than 30 days old. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 使用 AWS Backup 將 RDS 備份保留原則配置為 30 天以進行自動備份。手動刪除超過 30 天的手動備份。
A.en: Configure the RDS backup retention policy to 30 days for automated backups by using AWS Backup. Manually delete manual backups that are older than 30 days.

B.zh: 停用 RDS 自動備份。刪除超過 30 天的自動備份和手動備份。將 RDS 備份保留策略配置為 30 天以進行自動備份。
B.en: Disable RDS automated backups. Delete automated backups and manual backups that are older than 30 days. Configure the RDS backup retention policy to 30 days for automated backups.

C.zh: 將 RDS 備份保留原則配置為 30 天以進行自動備份。手動刪除超過 30 天的手動備份。
C.en: Configure the RDS backup retention policy to 30 days for automated backups. Manually delete manual backups that are older than 30 days.

D.zh: 停用 RDS 自動備份。使用 AWS CloudFormation 自動刪除超過 30 天的自動備份和手動備份。將 RDS 備份保留策略配置為 30 天以進行自動備份。
D.en: Disable RDS automated backups. Delete automated backups and manual backups that are older than 30 days automatically by using AWS CloudFormation. Configure the RDS backup retention policy to 30 days for automated backups.

A.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：AWS Backup可以管理RDS備份，但問題沒有提到需要使用AWS Backup來設定備份策略。手動刪除手動備份是可能的，但沒有提及如何自動化此過程。成本分析：使用AWS Backup可能會增加額外的成本，問題需要最具成本效益的解決方案。該選項不符合題目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: AWS Backup can manage RDS backup, but the question does not mention the need to use AWS Backup to configure the backup strategy. Manual deletion of manual backups is possible, but there is no mention of how to automate this process. Cost analysis: Using AWS Backup may add additional costs, and the question requires the most cost-effective solution. This option does not meet the question requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。分析：停用自動備份會導致資料保護風險，不符合問題要求。沒有提及如何自動化刪除備份的操作。成本分析：停用自動備份可能會降低成本，但會增加資料遺失的風險，且不符合最佳實務。該選項不符合題目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Disabling automatic backup will lead to data protection risks and does not meet the requirements of the question. There is no mention of how to automate the operation of deleting backups. Cost analysis: Disabling automatic backups may reduce costs, but increases the risk of data loss and is not in line with best practices. This option does not meet the question requirements.

C.zh: 正確。效能分析：自動備份的保留策略配置為30天是正確的。手動刪除超過30天的手動備份是可行的，並且符合問題要求。成本分析：此選項不需要額外的服務或工具，並且具有成本效益。此選項滿足問題要求。
C.en: Correct. Performance analysis: It is correct to configure the retention policy of automatic backup to 30 days. Manually deleting manual backups older than 30 days is feasible and meets the question requirements. Cost Analysis: This option requires no additional services or tools and is cost-effective. This option meets the requirements of the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。分析：停用自動備份會導致資料保護風險，不符合問題要求。使用 AWS CloudFormation 刪除備份不是最佳實踐，因為 CloudFormation 主要用於資源建立和管理，而不是備份管理。成本分析：停用自動備份可能會降低成本，但會增加資料遺失的風險，且不符合最佳實務。該選項不符合題目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Disabling automatic backup will lead to data protection risks and does not meet the requirements of the question. Deleting backups using AWS CloudFormation is not a best practice because CloudFormation is primarily used for resource creation and management, not backup management. Cost analysis: Disabling automatic backups may reduce costs, but increases the risk of data loss and is not in line with best practices. This option does not meet the question requirements.

answer_text.zh: C. 將 RDS 備份保留原則配置為 30 天以進行自動備份。手動刪除超過 30 天的手動備份。
answer_text.en: C. Configure the RDS backup retention policy to 30 days for automated backups. Manually delete manual backups that are older than 30 days.

Manually deleting manual backups older than 30 days is feasible and meets the question requirements. Cost Analysis: This option requires no additional services or tools and is cost-effective. questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正計劃將舊應用程式遷移到 AWS。該應用程式目前使用 NFS 與本地儲存解決方案通訊以儲存應用程式資料。為此，不能修改應用程式以使用 NFS 以外的任何其他通訊協定。解決方案架構師應建議在遷移後使用哪種儲存解決方案？
question_text.en: A company is planning to migrate a legacy application to AWS. The application currently uses NFS to communicate to an on- premises storage solution to store application data. The application cannot be modified to use any other communication protocols other than NFS for this purpose. Which storage solution should a solutions architect recommend for use after the migration?

A.zh: AWS DataSync
A.en: AWS DataSync

B.zh: Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS)
B.en: Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS)

C.zh: Amazon 彈性檔案系統 (Amazon EFS)
C.en: Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS)

D.zh: Amazon EMR 檔案系統 (Amazon EMRFS)
D.en: Amazon EMR File System (Amazon EMRFS)

A.zh: 錯誤。是一項資料遷移服務，用於將資料從本機儲存遷移到 AWS 儲存服務（例如 EFS 或 S3）。它不提供直接的 NFS 儲存功能。
A.en: Incorrect. is a data migration service used to migrate data from local storage to AWS storage services (such as EFS or S3). It does not provide direct NFS storage functionality.

B.zh: 錯誤。Amazon EBS 是一種區塊儲存服務，主要設計用於 EC2 執行個體。不支援NFS協議，無法滿足問題中應用程式的需求。
B.en: Incorrect. Amazon EBS is a block storage service primarily designed for use with EC2 instances. It does not support the NFS protocol and cannot meet the needs of the application in the question.

C.zh: 正確。Amazon EFS 是一項支援 NFS 協定的完全託管文件儲存服務。它可以直接與遷移的應用程式集成，以滿足問題中應用程式的需求。
C.en: Correct. Amazon EFS is a fully managed file storage service that supports the NFS protocol. It can be directly integrated with the migrated application to meet the needs of the application in the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。Amazon EMRFS 是專為 Amazon EMR (Elastic MapReduce) 設計的檔案系統，主要用於與 S3 整合。不支援NFS協議，無法滿足問題中應用程式的需求。
D.en: Incorrect. Amazon EMRFS is a file system specially designed for Amazon EMR (Elastic MapReduce), mainly used for integration with S3. It does not support the NFS protocol and cannot meet the needs of the application in the question.

answer_text.zh: C. Amazon 彈性檔案系統 (Amazon EFS)
answer_text.en: C. Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS)

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon EFS 是一項支援 NFS 協定的完全託管文件儲存服務。它可以直接與遷移的應用程式集成，以滿足問題中應用程式的需求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon EFS is a fully managed file storage service that supports the NFS protocol. It can be directly integrated with the migrated application to meet the needs of the application in the question.
